---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project.
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

# Is your feature request related to a problem?
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. (e.g., I have an issue when multiple NPCs mix up their memories.)

# Describe the solution you'd like
A clear and concise description of the specific feature or logic you want to be added.

# Additional context
Add any other context, ideas, or relevant links about the feature request here.
